north_star.statement: Maximize long-term freedom by building valuable products, developing rare technical skills, maintaining excellent physical and mental health, and creating multiple independent income streams.

campaign.name: Escape Velocity
success_criteria: System design project (preferably applied AI) built and published
Expense Tracker MVP shipped and usable end-to-end in production
At least one Personal Brand artifact published per week
₹32,000/month set aside into the Opportunity Fund

week.theme: Start the system design foundation and lock the Expense Tracker MVP scope, while protecting the weekend that's already unavailable.
objectives: Pick a system design learning resource and complete 2 hours of lecture/study
Finalize Expense Tracker MVP scope and ship exactly one artifact toward it
known_risks: Two days of Oracle work crunch this week (exact days unconfirmed)
Unavailable Saturday 2026-07-18 and the first half of Sunday 2026-07-19

today.artifact: Written MVP scope decision (locked feature list)
today.success_definition: MVP scope is written down and locked as a fixed feature list, not left open for further deliberation.
known_risks: Oracle crunch days this week not yet confirmed

dashboard.footer: Does today's attention increase long-term freedom?
